title: The 3 Best Wearable Tech Stocks to Keep an Eye On
text: Recently, Americans have been notably pessimistic. Gallup reported “overwhelmingly high” levels of pessimism in mid-October, a sentiment echoed by the University of Michigan.

title: 3 Fitness Stocks to Keep Your Portfolio in Tip-Top Shape
text: Based on news reports, the Western world may have taken more interest in fitness and health during the pandemic. Because it was theorized that excess weight affected survival chances, many individuals began to take their overall health more seriously.

title: The 3 Home Fitness Stocks Most Likely to Reshape the Industry
text: Home fitness took off during the pandemic as people resorted to buying their own equipment instead of going to the gym. The trend led to significant gains for companies that operate within the industry.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Introduces eTrex Solar to Boost Outdoor Segment
text: Garmin (GRMN) unveils eTrex Solar, a solar-powered handheld GPS device for hikers, geocachers and adventure enthusiasts.

title: Is It Too Late to Buy Garmin Stock?
text: Garmin recently hiked its outlook after a strong fiscal Q3. The stock isn't cheap, but investors can still see good returns from here.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Bolsters Marine Segment With New Smartwatch
text: Garmin (GRMN) launches quatix 7 Pro, a next-gen high-performance smartwatch for mariners, sailors and anglers.

title: Never run out of power with the all-new eTrex Solar from Garmin
text: Garmin's first solar-charging handheld GPS can provide infinite battery life, wireless connectivity and more to let you explore longer OLATHE, Kan. , Nov. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the eTrex® Solar , an easy-to-use GPS handheld that utilizes solar power to go the extra mile.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Expands Descent Series With New Smartwatch
text: Garmin (GRMN) unveils Descent G1 Solar - Ocean Edition, a watch-style dive computer for adventure enthusiasts.

title: 2 Soaring Growth Stocks That Are Still Worth Buying Today
text: Lululemon has been firing on all cylinders in 2023, even after huge sales gains last year. Garmin recently hiked its growth outlook and is targeting a 20% profit margin this year.

title: Garmin introduces premium quatix 7 Pro marine smartwatch
text: Newest GPS watch for mariners includes an AMOLED display, built-in LED flashlight and up to 16 days of battery life OLATHE, Kan. , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced the quatix® 7 Pro  – its next-gen high-performance smartwatch optimized for marine life.

title: Garmin (GRMN) is a Top-Ranked Momentum Stock: Should You Buy?
text: Wondering how to pick strong, market-beating stocks for your investment portfolio? Look no further than the Zacks Style Scores.

title: Garmin's new Descent Mk3 series dive computers have 200-meter dive ratings, bright AMOLED displays and options with a built-in flashlight
text: Pair Descent Mk3i with the new Descent T2 transceiver for diver communication, Diver Assistance and tank pressure monitoring OLATHE, Kan. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the Descent™ Mk3 series watch-style dive computers and Descent T2 transceiver  with enhanced SubWave™ sonar technology that – through a soon-to-be-released software update – will add diver-to-diver messaging and Diver Assistance1 to tank pressure monitoring.

title: Garmin unveils the Descent G1 Solar - Ocean Edition dive computer, its first-ever product made with recycled ocean-bound plastics
text: All-in-one dive computer and smartwatch is powered by the sun and includes parts made from recycled plastics that were once destined for the ocean OLATHE, Kan. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the Descent™ G1 Solar – Ocean Edition , a rugged watch-style dive computer with features for both underwater and topside adventures.

title: 2023 Garmin Health Summit celebrates smartwatch-enabled digital health solutions
text: Fifth annual event recognizes innovative wellness solutions, highlights Polaris Dawn's smartwatch research collaboration and debuts powerful new biometrics exclusively for Garmin Health customers OLATHE, Kan. , Nov. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin Health, a leading provider of digital health solutions that leverage the data and insights of the Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) product ecosystem, today announced the winners of the 2023 Garmin Health Awards presented at the fifth annual Garmin Health Summit held in Singapore.

title: Garmin's (GRMN) Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Garmin's (GRMN) third-quarter results benefit from strength in the Fitness, Auto OEM, Outdoor and Aviation segments.

title: Garmin Ltd. (GRMN) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN ) Q3 2023 Results Conference Call November 1, 2023 10:30 AM ET Company Participants Teri Seck - Director, IR Cliff Pemble - President and CEO Doug Boessen - CFO and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Joseph Cardoso - JPMorgan George Wang - Barclays Ben Bollin - Cleveland Research David MacGregor - Longbow Research Noah Zatzkin - KeyBanc Ivan Feinseth - Tigress Financial Partners Teri Seck [Call Starts Abruptly] related slides are available at Garmin's Investor Relations site on the Internet at www.garmin.com/stock.

title: Why Garmin Stock Popped After Earnings
text: Garmin just boosted 2023 revenue guidance for the second time this year. Garmin has an enviable balance sheet with a pile of cash and no debt.

title: Garmin stock climbs on 3Q beat and full year revenue boost
text: Garmin Ltd shares jumped 11% to $113.44 in late-morning trading on Wednesday after the navigation equipment maker reported third quarter 2023 financial results that exceeded expectations on both the top and bottom lines as the company also raised its annual revenue forecast.  For 3Q, Garmin saw a 12% year-over-year increase in revenue to $1.28 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus forecast of $1.21 billion according to LSEG, on strength in its auto and fitness businesses.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Garmin (GRMN) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Garmin raises holiday period sales forecast, beats quarterly estimates
text: Navigation equipment maker Garmin Ltd raised its annual sales forecast for the crucial holiday shopping period as strength in its auto and fitness businesses helped it beat third-quarter revenue estimates.

title: Garmin announces third quarter 2023 results
text: Company reports double-digit third quarter revenue and operating income growth SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , Nov. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin® Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN), today announced results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2023.
